case_title: DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD VS. HERACLIO ARIAS et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARIAS, HERACLIO $13,433.96 PRINCIPAL, $409.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,843.46, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD AS TO DEFENDANT ARIAS, HERACLIO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-09-2010
DECLARATION RE WAIVER OF ATTORNEY'S FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD AS TO DEFENDANT ARIAS, HERACLIO
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $409.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ARIAS, HERACLIO
